VQLClientActions.precondition: SELECT OS From info() where OS = 'windows'

Query.VQL: LET UntrustedAuthenticode <= get(field='UntrustedAuthenticode') = TRUE OR get(field='UntrustedAuthenticode') =~ '^(Y|TRUE|YES|OK)$'
LET UseTracker <= get(field='UseTracker') = TRUE OR get(field='UseTracker') =~ '^(Y|TRUE|YES|OK)$'
LET DISABLE_DANGEROUS_API_CALLS <= get(field='DISABLE_DANGEROUS_API_CALLS') = TRUE OR get(field='DISABLE_DANGEROUS_API_CALLS') =~ '^(Y|TRUE|YES|OK)$'
LET precondition_Windows_System_Pslist_0 = SELECT OS FROM info() WHERE OS = 'windows'

LET ProcList = SELECT * FROM if(condition=UseTracker, then={ SELECT CreateTime, Pid, Ppid, NULL AS TokenIsElevated, Username, Name, CommandLine, Exe, NULL AS Memory FROM process_tracker_pslist() }, else={ SELECT * FROM pslist() })

LET Windows_System_Pslist_0_1 = SELECT CreateTime, Pid, Ppid, TokenIsElevated, Name, CommandLine, Exe, token(pid=int(int=Pid)) AS TokenInfo, hash(path=Exe) AS Hash, authenticode(filename=Exe) AS Authenticode, Username, Memory.WorkingSetSize AS WorkingSetSize FROM ProcList WHERE Name =~ ProcessRegex  AND Pid =~ PidRegex  AND Exe =~ ExePathRegex  AND CommandLine =~ CommandLineRegex  AND Username =~ UsernameRegex  AND NOT if(condition=UntrustedAuthenticode, then=Authenticode.Trusted = 'trusted' OR NOT Exe, else=False)

Query.Name: $9e046f5f284acabc11ec234cfa49e9a6f02ecf493833a4350d4fddf6a0513a7e
Query.VQL: SELECT * FROM if(then=Windows_System_Pslist_0_1, condition=precondition_Windows_System_Pslist_0, else={ SELECT * FROM scope() WHERE log(message='Query skipped due to precondition')  AND FALSE })
